Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE1: Search CRM for Mosaic Robotics, Sunbelt Venture Partners and Palmetto Community Foundation using crm_search_companies (query: "Mosaic Robotics", "Sunbelt", "Palmetto") to identify account details, deal history and ownership. Discover that Tamara Byrd is the CRM contact for Mosaic, but Raj Greenfield (Sunbelt) and Carmen Delgado-Reyes (Palmetto) have no CRM contact records. Also discover that Sunbelt has two duplicate company records with conflicting data.
OE2: Search emails using search_emails (query: "Mosaic damage", "INV-2026", "Sunbelt pricing", "Palmetto invoice" or similar) to retrieve the Mosaic prototype damage complaint thread from Tamara Byrd, the Sunbelt invoice inquiry thread from Raj Greenfield, and the Palmetto invoice discrepancy thread from Carmen Delgado-Reyes. Discover that INV-2026-0398 (Sunbelt, $4,800) and INV-2026-0399 (Palmetto, $2,400) had their PDF attachments swapped during Hana Kim's batch send on April 10.
OE3: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (query: "invoice", "damage claim", "pricing" or similar) across channels including #finance and #customer-engagement to find internal discussions on the invoice mix-up, damage claim updates and escalation threads. Discover Marcus Thorne's $40K insurance gap analysis in #finance, David Chen's escalation in #customer-engagement, and Chloe Vance's chain-of-custody investigation in #operations.
OE4: List CRM engagement notes using crm_list_engagements (company_ids for Mosaic, Sunbelt, Palmetto) to review activity logs, latest status, commitments and deadlines for all three accounts.
OE5: Search contacts using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Tamara Byrd", "Raj Greenfield", "Carmen Delgado-Reyes", "David Chen", "Chloe Vance" or similar) to retrieve and verify exact email addresses before drafting client and internal emails.
OE6: Search QuickBooks invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria: "INV-2026-0398", "INV-2026-0399" or similar) to verify invoice amounts and confirm the billing system records are correct: Sunbelt INV-2026-0398 = $4,800 (commercial rate), Palmetto INV-2026-0399 = $2,400 (nonprofit rate). Also discover the Mosaic credit memo CM-2026-0415 and $90K contingent liability accrual with a $40K insurance gap ($90K prototype value minus $50K vendor liability cap).
OE7: Search CRM for missing or duplicate contact and company records using crm_search_companies (query: "Sunbelt", "Palmetto") and crm_search_contacts (query: "Raj Greenfield", "Carmen Delgado-Reyes"). Discover that Sunbelt has two duplicate company records and that neither Raj Greenfield nor Carmen Delgado-Reyes exists as a CRM contact.
OE8: Send email using send_email from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com summarizing damage claim status, insurance coverage, the $40K exposure gap ($90K prototype minus $50K vendor liability cap) and next steps.
OE9: Send email using send_email from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to raj.greenfield@sunbeltvp.com and victoria.chen-nakamura@sunbeltvp.com, CC david.chen@moveops.com, explaining the invoice PDF attachment error, confirming correct pricing of $4,800 at commercial rate for INV-2026-0398, and addressing the nonprofit pricing confusion caused by the swapped Palmetto PDF.
OE10: Send email using send_email from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to carmen.delgado-reyes@palmettofoundation.org confirming correct invoice amount of $2,400 for INV-2026-0399, providing a written explanation of the PDF swap error for audit documentation, and confirming timeline ahead of the May 15 vendor audit deadline.
OE11: Send internal summary email using send_email from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to david.chen@moveops.com, CC chloe.vance@moveops.com, outlining account-wise status for Mosaic (damage claim, $40K exposure), Sunbelt (invoice correction, portfolio pricing conversation from Victoria), and Palmetto (invoice correction, audit deadline), plus key risks, ownership gaps and escalation concerns.
OE12: Create CRM contact records for Raj Greenfield (raj.greenfield@sunbeltvp.com, Sunbelt Venture Partners) and Carmen Delgado-Reyes (carmen.delgado-reyes@palmettofoundation.org, Palmetto Community Foundation) using crm_create_contact to fill the missing contact gaps discovered in OE7.
OE13: Update deal stages in CRM using crm_update_deal_stage for affected deals across Mosaic, Sunbelt and Palmetto to reflect the current situation based on investigation findings.
OE14: Log engagement activities in CRM using crm_create_engagement for Mosaic (damage claim status, insurance gap, remediation steps), Sunbelt (invoice correction sent, portfolio pricing conversation) and Palmetto (invoice correction sent, audit documentation provided) to record all communications and actions taken.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The model must use a CRM search tool (e.g., `crm_search_contacts` or `crm_search_companies`)
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called crm_search_companies (3 times for Mosaic, Sunbelt, Palmetto) and crm_search_contacts (4 times). Both tools were used.
✓Run #2The agent made multiple crm_search_companies calls (calls 8-10, querying 'Mosaic', 'Sunbelt', 'Palmetto') and multiple crm_search_contacts calls (calls 46-49). Both search tools were used.
✓Run #3The agent called crm_search_companies for 'Mosaic', 'Sunbelt', and 'Palmetto' (trajectory items [2], [4], [6]), and also called crm_search_contacts multiple times (items [88], [90], [92]).
✓Run #4The agent made multiple `crm_search_companies` calls with inputs for 'Mosaic', 'Sunbelt', and 'Palmetto', and also called `crm_search_contacts` with `{"full_name": "Mosaic"}`. CRM search tools were clearly used.
✓Run #5The agent called crm_search_companies (3 times for Mosaic, Sunbelt, Palmetto) and crm_search_contacts (3 times for Raj Greenfield, Carmen Delgado, Victoria Chen). Both CRM search tools were used.
✓Run #6The agent called mcp__crm_search_companies for 'Mosaic', 'Sunbelt', and 'Palmetto', and also called mcp__crm_search_contacts with 'Sunbelt'. CRM search tools were used.
2 The model must use `quickbooks_search_invoices` tool
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1quickbooks_search_invoices was called 3 times, searching for INV-2026-0398, INV-2026-0399, and INV-2026-0411.
✓Run #2The agent called quickbooks_search_invoices three times in parallel (calls 22-24), including lookups for INV-2026-0398 and INV-2026-0399.
✓Run #3The agent called quickbooks_search_invoices three times (items [42], [44], [46]) with DocNumber criteria INV-2026-0398, INV-2026-0399, and INV-2026-0411 respectively.
✓Run #4The agent called `quickbooks_search_invoices` twice — once with `{"DocNumber": "INV-2026-0398"}` and once with `{"DocNumber": "INV-2026-0399"}`, confirming the correct invoice amounts.
✓Run #5The agent called quickbooks_search_invoices three times: once with DocNumber 'INV-2026-0398', once with 'INV-2026-0399', and once with 'INV-2026-0411'.
✓Run #6The agent called mcp__quickbooks_search_invoices for DocNumber 'INV-2026-0398' and 'INV-2026-0399', and also INV-2026-0411. The tool was clearly used.
3 The model must use `crm_list_engagements` to review existing engagement history for Mosaic, Sunbelt, or Palmetto.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1crm_list_engagements was called twice — once for company_mosaic and once for company_sunbelt. The criterion requires it for Mosaic, Sunbelt, or Palmetto (any one qualifies), so this passes.
✓Run #2The agent called crm_list_engagements twice: once for company_mosaic (call 32) and once for company_sunbelt (call 42).
✓Run #3The agent called crm_list_engagements with company_ids: ['company_mosaic'] (item [56]), satisfying the requirement to review engagement history for at least one of the three accounts.
✓Run #4The agent called `crm_list_engagements` with `{"company_ids": ["company_mosaic"]}` to review engagement history for Mosaic Robotics.
✓Run #5The agent called crm_list_engagements four times: for company_mosaic, company_sunbelt (two different IDs), and crm_company_69f1ae00a4b9 (Palmetto).
✓Run #6The agent called mcp__crm_list_engagements for company_ids ['company_mosaic'] and separately for ['company_sunbelt'], satisfying the requirement to review engagement history for these accounts.
4 The model must pass "Tamara Byrd" or similar when calling `crm_search_contacts`
query construction
 ✗✓✗✗✗✗ 17%
✗Run #1The agent never searched crm_search_contacts for 'Tamara Byrd' or similar. The four searches were for 'Mosaic', 'Raj Greenfield', 'Carmen', and 'Victoria'. Tamara Byrd was accessed directly via crm_get_contact('contact_mosaic_hr'), not via a contact search.
✓Run #2Call 46 explicitly searched crm_search_contacts with full_name 'Tamara Byrd' and found her at Mosaic Robotics with email tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com.
✗Run #3The agent used crm_get_contact with id 'contact_mosaic_hr' (item [38]) to look up Tamara Byrd's record, but never called crm_search_contacts with 'Tamara Byrd' or similar as the query. The criterion specifically requires crm_search_contacts.
✗Run #4The only `crm_search_contacts` call was with `{"full_name": "Mosaic"}`. The agent found Tamara Byrd by calling `crm_get_contact` on a contact ID retrieved from the company record, but never searched contacts directly by 'Tamara Byrd' or similar.
✗Run #5The agent never called crm_search_contacts with 'Tamara Byrd'. Instead, it used crm_get_contact with a known ID ('contact_mosaic_hr'). No crm_search_contacts call with Tamara Byrd or similar query exists in the trajectory.
✗Run #6The agent retrieved Tamara Byrd via mcp__crm_get_contact (using ID 'contact_mosaic_hr'), not via crm_search_contacts with 'Tamara Byrd'. No crm_search_contacts call with 'Tamara Byrd' or similar is present in the trajectory.
5 The model must pass a query related to "Raj Greenfield" (or similar) when calling `crm_search_contacts`.
query construction
 ✓✓✓✗✓✗ 67%
✓Run #1crm_search_contacts was called with full_name 'Raj Greenfield', matching this criterion exactly.
✓Run #2Call 47 explicitly searched crm_search_contacts with full_name 'Raj Greenfield' and found no match, confirming he was missing from CRM.
✓Run #3The agent called crm_search_contacts with full_name: 'Raj Greenfield' (item [88]), matching the criterion's requirement.
✗Run #4No `crm_search_contacts` call was made for 'Raj Greenfield' or similar. The agent discovered Raj through email searches and deal descriptions, then directly created a new CRM contact without searching first.
✓Run #5The agent called crm_search_contacts with full_name 'Raj Greenfield' (call #30), confirming no CRM record existed.
✗Run #6The agent called crm_search_contacts with query 'Sunbelt', not 'Raj Greenfield'. No crm_search_contacts call with 'Raj' or 'Greenfield' is present in the trajectory.
6 The model must pass a query related to "Carmen Delgado-Reyes" (or similar) when calling `crm_search_contacts`.
query construction
 ✓✓✓✗✓✗ 67%
✓Run #1crm_search_contacts was called with full_name 'Carmen', which matches 'Carmen Delgado-Reyes' or similar.
✓Run #2Call 48 searched crm_search_contacts with full_name 'Carmen Delgado' and found no match, confirming she was missing from CRM.
✓Run #3The agent called crm_search_contacts with full_name: 'Carmen Delgado' (item [90]), which matches 'Carmen Delgado-Reyes' or similar as required.
✗Run #4No `crm_search_contacts` call was made for 'Carmen Delgado-Reyes' or similar. The agent found Carmen through email and deal data, then directly created a new CRM contact without a prior contact search.
✓Run #5The agent called crm_search_contacts with full_name 'Carmen Delgado' (call #31), confirming no CRM record existed.
✗Run #6No crm_search_contacts call with 'Carmen', 'Delgado-Reyes', or any Palmetto contact name is found in the trajectory.
7 The model must pass queries referencing "Mosaic damage", "Sunbelt", or similar when calling `search_emails` tool
query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1search_emails was called 17 times with queries including 'Mosaic damage', 'Sunbelt invoice', 'Palmetto invoice', 'Raj invoice clarification', 'Sunbelt attachment wrong', and similar relevant keywords.
✓Run #2The agent ran search_emails with queries including 'Mosaic damage', 'Sunbelt invoice', 'Palmetto invoice', 'Mosaic', 'Sunbelt', and 'Palmetto' across multiple rounds (calls 5-7 and 14-16).
✓Run #3The agent called search_emails with queries 'Mosaic damage' (item [14]), 'Sunbelt invoice' (item [16]), 'Palmetto invoice' (item [18]), and 'Mosaic damage prototype' (item [50]), among others.
✓Run #4The agent called `search_emails` with queries including 'Mosaic damage', 'Sunbelt', 'Palmetto', 'Sunbelt invoice', 'Palmetto invoice', and 'Mosaic', satisfying the requirement for relevant email search queries.
✓Run #5The agent called search_emails with queries 'Mosaic damage', 'Sunbelt invoice', 'Palmetto invoice', and broader queries 'Mosaic', 'Sunbelt', 'Palmetto'.
✓Run #6The agent called search_emails with 'Mosaic damage', 'Sunbelt invoice', 'Palmetto invoice', 'Sunbelt', and 'Palmetto', satisfying the requirement for meaningful keyword queries related to these accounts.
8 The model must pass keywords related to invoice issues or damage claims when calling `conversations_search_messages` tool
query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1conversations_search_messages was called 6 times with queries including 'Mosaic damage', 'Sunbelt invoice', and 'Palmetto invoice', all containing invoice and damage-related keywords.
✓Run #2Calls 2-4 searched Slack for 'Mosaic damage', 'Sunbelt invoice', and 'Palmetto invoice'. Later calls included 'Heartland damage prototype' and 'Zara Okoye damage'. These cover invoice, damage claim, and pricing keywords.
✓Run #3The agent called conversations_search_messages with 'Mosaic damage' (item [8]), 'Sunbelt invoice' (item [10]), 'Palmetto invoice' (item [12]), and 'Mosaic damage prototype Heartland' (item [54]).
✓Run #4The agent called `conversations_search_messages` with queries including 'Sunbelt Palmetto invoice', 'invoice', and 'damage', meeting the requirement for relevant Slack search keywords.
✓Run #5The agent called conversations_search_messages with 'Mosaic damage', 'Sunbelt invoice', and 'Palmetto invoice', all of which directly relate to invoice issues and damage claims.
✓Run #6The agent called conversations_search_messages with 'Mosaic damage', 'Sunbelt Palmetto invoice', 'invoice', 'damage', 'Mosaic', 'Sunbelt', and 'Palmetto', all of which are targeted keywords relevant to the invoice issues and damage claims.
9 The model must pass "INV-2026-0398" or "INV-2026-0399" when calling `quickbooks_search_invoices` tool
query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1quickbooks_search_invoices was called with DocNumber 'INV-2026-0398' and separately with 'INV-2026-0399', covering both required invoice IDs.
